table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the the itemcan appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Questionnaire

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: http://fhir.org/guides/who/emcare/Questionnaire/EmCare.B10-16.Signs.2m.p#0.1.0

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S2.DE01

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client's respiratory rate

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B10S1.DE06=’EmCare.B10S1.DE08’ or %EmCare.B10S1.DE02 = ‘EmCare.B10S1.DE04’) and %danger_sign = false

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S2.DE03

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has chest indrawing

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S2.DE02 = true

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has been HIV exposed / infected

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S2.DE03 = ‘yes’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B10S2.DE05

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has stridor in a calm child while the client is at rest

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S2.DE03 = ‘no’

tr.td: The client is wheezing

Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S2.DE06 = ‘yes’

tr.td: EmCare.B10S2.DE08

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client's oxygen saturation measurement

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S2.DE07 = ‘no’ and %EmCare.B10S2.DE06 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B11S2.DE01

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has sunken eyes

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B11S1.DE02 = ‘EmCare.B11S1.DE04’ or (%EmCare.B11S1.DE05= ‘yes’ and (%EmCare.B7.DE08 = true or %EmCare.B7.DE09 = true or %EmCare.B7.DE10 = ‘EmCare.B7.DE11’)))

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B11S2.DE02

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The healthcare worker pinches the skin of the client's abdomen for 1 second and then observes how long the skin takes to return to normal once released

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.B11S2.DE01 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B11S2.DE06

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is restless and irritable

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.B11S2.DE02 = ‘EmCare.B11S2.DE05’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S2.DE01

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has a stiff neck

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: (%EmCare.B11S2.DE06 = ‘no’ and %EmCare.B7.DE14 = ‘fluid_test_passed’) or %EmCare.B6.DE01 >=37.5 or %EmCare.B12S1.DE03 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE05’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE06 = ‘yes’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE07 = ‘yes’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 = ‘yes’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S2.DE02

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The health care worker has seen that client is refusing to use a limb

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.B12S2.DE01 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S2.DE03

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has a warm tender or swollen joint or bone

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.B12S2.DE02 = ‘no’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S2.DE04

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client is reported to have oral sores or mouth ulcers

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
Enable When: %EmCare.B12S2.DE03 = ‘no’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 != ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE09’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 != ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE10’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 != ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE11’

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td: EmCare.B12S2.DE05

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The health care worker determines if there is an obvious cause of fever (to determine if Malaria test is required) If no obvious cause of fever a malaria test will be prompted

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The client has a measles rash

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth

text.value: The client's respiratory rate
The client has chest indrawing
The client has been HIV exposed / infected
The client has stridor in a calm child while the client is at rest
The client is wheezing
The client has experienced recurrent wheeze
The client's oxygen saturation measurement

expression.value: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B11S1.DE02 = ‘EmCare.B11S1.DE04’ or (%EmCare.B11S1.DE05= ‘yes’ and (%EmCare.B7.DE08 = true or %EmCare.B7.DE09 = true or %EmCare.B7.DE10 = ‘EmCare.B7.DE11’)))

text.value: The client has sunken eyes
The healthcare worker pinches the skin of the client's abdomen for 1 second and then observes how long the skin takes to return to normal once released
The client is restless and irritable

expression.value: (%EmCare.B11S2.DE06 = ‘no’ and %EmCare.B7.DE14 = ‘fluid_test_passed’) or %EmCare.B6.DE01 >=37.5 or %EmCare.B12S1.DE03 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE05’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE06 = ‘yes’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE07 = ‘yes’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 = ‘yes’

text.value: The client has a stiff neck
The health care worker has seen that client is refusing to use a limb
The client has a warm tender or swollen joint or bone
The client is reported to have oral sores or mouth ulcers
The health care worker determines if there is an obvious cause of fever (to determine if Malaria test is required) If no obvious cause of fever a malaria test will be prompted
The client has a runny nose
The client has red eyes
The client has a generalised rash
The client has a measles rash
The client has had measles in the last 3 months
The client has clouding of the cornea
The client has pus draining from the eye
The client has tender swelling behind the ear
The client has pus draining from the ear which has been seen by the health care worker
The length of time the client has or has had pus draining from the ear
The client has pus draining from the eye
The client has clouding of the cornea
Clouding of the cornea in the client is a new problem
Clouding of the cornea has not been previously treated in the client
The client has a generalised or localised skin problem
The client has blisters, sores or pustules
The client has a specific type of skin problem(s)
The client has signs of Severe Impetigo / Folliculitis
The client has an extensive skin problem
The client has a severe skin problem
The client has oral sores or mouth ulcers
The health care worker would like to add a Skin or Mouth or Eye problem found during the physical exam
The client has severe palmar pallor
The client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area
